title: rhomboda moulmeinensis
intro: Rhomboda moulmeinensis, commonly known as Moulmein orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is said to possess various health benefits, such as aiding in digestion and providing relief from fever and cough. The therapeutic actions of Rhomboda moulmeinensis are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
